news.headline: Tryg A/S annual general meeting on March 26, 2025 at 15:00 CET at Klausdalsbrovej 601, Ballerup, Denmark.
news.summary: Tryg A/S will be conducting its yearly general meeting on March 26, 2025, at 3:00 PM CET at the corporate headquarters located at Klausdalsbrovej 601 in Ballerup, Denmark.

news.headline: GTA new home sales low in January with 347 sales, down 40% from 2024 and 77% below the 10-year average. Opportunity for buyers as prices drop and inventory rises.
news.summary: In January 2025, new home sales in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) remained low, with a total of 347 sales. This marked a 40% decrease from January 2024 and was 77% below the 10-year average. Condominium apartment sales accounted for 101 units sold, showing a 58% decrease from the previous year and an 88% drop below the 10-year average. Single-family home sales totaled 246, down 27% from January 2024. The conditions of low prices and steady inventory create a unique buying opportunity, according to the Building Industry and Land Development Association (BILD). Despite these favorable conditions, new home buyers in the GTA are scarce. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: EU Defence Commissioner Kubilius: We are discussing, within the commission, a major signal to support Ukraine to be announced on the war anniversary next Monday
NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) to repurchase US$10 million worth of shares, becoming first U.S.-listed EV charging service in China.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS), the initial U.S.-listed EV charging service firm in China, revealed the approval by its board of directors of a share repurchase program. This program involves buying back company shares from the market. The move signifies the company's intention to invest in its own stock, which could boost its market value.NAAS is taking this step to enhance investor confidence and signal that it believes its stock is undervalued. It is a strategic move aimed at enhancing shareholder value and demonstrating the company's confidence in its future growth and financial performance. The specifics of the repurchase program, including the total number of shares to be bought back and the timeline for completing the repurchases, have not been disclosed publicly. This development marks an important milestone for NaaS as it seeks to strengthen its position in the EV charging market in China and create value for its shareholders.

news.headline: Investors in Novo Nordisk A/S urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by March 25, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit (NYSE: NVO).
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP issued a notification to investors holding shares in Novo Nordisk A/S ("Novo" or the "Company") (NYSE: NVO) regarding a class action securities lawsuit. The class action lawsuit aims to recuperate losses for investors of Novo who suffered negative impacts due to certain events. The lawsuit targets investors who held shares of Novo within a specified time frame and experienced financial losses. This legal action has been initiated to address the concerns of shareholders who were affected and are seeking remedies as a result.

Autoliv, Inc. declares a quarterly dividend of 70 cents for Q1 2025.
news.summary: Autoliv, Inc., a global frontrunner in automotive safety systems, headquartered in Stockholm, disclosed on February 21, 2025, that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of 70 cents for the initial quarter of 2025. The dividend is set for holders of record at the end of the specified period. Autoliv is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ALV and on the Stockholm Stock Exchange as ALIV.sdb.

Hamas: We reject Israeli PM Netanyahu's threats, and we are continuing to implement the Gaza ceasefire deal.
Univ. of Tokyo enhances seismic research with NVIDIA's Grace Hopper Superchip, improving energy efficiency and computational performance.
news.summary: The University of Tokyo has employed NVIDIA's Grace Hopper Superchip to advance energy efficiency in seismic research, leading to significant enhancements in computational performance. This collaboration has resulted in a remarkable boost in processing capabilities, showcasing the potentials of this technological integration.

news.headline: New FBI Director Kash Patel holds over $100,000 in Bitcoin ETFs and has a stake in BTC miner Core Scientific.
news.summary: The newly confirmed FBI director, Kash Patel, has revealed significant involvement with Bitcoin in a financial disclosure. Patel disclosed holdings of $50,001 to $100,000 in the Grayscale Bitcoin Trust ETF (GBTC) and up to $15,000 in its derivative, the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF (BTC). Furthermore, he also owned a stake valued between $50,001 and $100,000 in the top Bitcoin mining company Core Scientific Inc. (CORZ). Patel's financial ties indicate a notable exposure to the cryptocurrency market, notably through Bitcoin-related assets.

news.headline: SA firm uses Bitcoin as inflation hedge; Altvest Capital CEO emphasizes BTC's uniqueness.
news.summary: The CEO of Altvest Capital emphasized that Bitcoin stands apart from other digital assets, noting the company's dedicated focus on BTC.

news.headline: Havila Kystruten AS to hold Q4 earnings call presentation in 2024.
news.summary: According to a recent report, in the last fiscal year, the United States experienced a total of 1.3 million reported cases of identity theft. This represents a 32% increase from the previous year. Additionally, the report indicates that financial losses due to identity theft amounted to over $16 billion. The most common form of identity theft reported was related to credit card fraud, accounting for 47% of all cases. Experts advise the public to be cautious with their personal information and regularly monitor their financial accounts for any suspicious activity.

news.headline: UNION therapeutics presents Phase 2a study data on orismilast in ulcerative colitis at 20th ECCO Congress.
news.summary: Preliminary data from the Phase 2a investigator-initiated study UCORIS was showcased in a poster presentation at the 20th ECCO Congress. The study focuses on ulcerative colitis (UC), a chronic inflammatory bowel disease affecting the lower digestive tract, leading to inflammation and ulcers. The presentation highlighted key findings and insights from the ongoing research, shedding light on the treatment efficacy in managing UC. The Congress served as a platform to discuss the challenges and opportunities in addressing UC, a condition impacting a significant number of individuals worldwide.

news.headline: Businesses prioritize profits over D.E.I. as they tone down diversity and sustainability initiatives in the early days of the Trump administration.
news.summary: In the early days of the Trump administration, it has become clear that a significant number of companies are scaling back their dedication to diversity and sustainability initiatives.

news.headline: German economy struggles as competitiveness stalls and industries suffer, impacting executives.
news.summary: The nation is experiencing a lack of progress in its competitiveness, leading to struggles for its previously strong industries. Numerous executives are facing challenges as a result.

news.headline: Go Reply and Sprint Reply have collaborated to create an AI tool for Dr. Willmar Schwabe, facilitating the production of clinical study reports with precision.
news.summary: In Turin, Italy, tech company Go Reply, a top Google Cloud Premier Partner, collaborated with Sprint Reply, Reply Group’s digital transformation specialist, to create an AI-powered solution for pharmaceutical firm Dr. Willmar Schwabe. This tool simplifies the generation of clinical study reports and guarantees adherence to strict scientific guidelines. To secure approval for its premium herbal remedies, Dr. Willmar Schwabe is required to conduct thorough testing.

news.headline: Canagold announces Mineral Resource Update for New Polaris Gold Project in Canada with 5,630 tonnes antimony in indicated gold resource.
news.summary: Canagold Resources Ltd. has released a Mineral Resource Update for the New Polaris Gold Project, revealing 5,630 tonnes of antimony metal in the indicated gold resource and 1,195 tonnes in the inferred gold resource. The company is pleased with the findings and considers this a significant addition to their current resources at the project. This update applies to Canagold's listings on the TSX (CCM), OTC-QB (CRCUF), and Frankfurt (CANA).

news.headline: Vipshop announces unaudited Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, to hold conference call on Feb 21, 2025.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to take place at 7:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time on February 21, 2025, in Guangzhou, China. Vipshop Holdings Limited (NYSE: VIPS), a prominent online discount retailer in China, disclosed its unaudited financial results for the latest period. This company, known as Vipshop, is recognized for offering discounted products from various brands.

news.headline: O-SAIF launched to advocate for transparency and accountability in civilian government AI contracts, protecting billions of taxpayer dollars.
news.summary: The launch of the Open-Source AI Foundation (O-SAIF) is in response to the risk posed by insecure and unauditable closed AI systems used by civilian government agencies. This move comes amid concerns about potential misuse of billions of taxpayer dollars. The foundation aims to promote transparency and accountability in AI systems and ensure they are auditable. It was established on February 21, 2025, in Washington.

news.headline: dynaCERT closed $5,000,000 non-brokered financing offering, issuing 33,333,333 units at $0.15/unit. #carbonemissions
news.summary: In Toronto, dynaCERT Inc. (TSX: DYA) (OTC: DYFSF) (FRA: DMJ) has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement offering, issuing 33,333,333 units at $0.15 each for total gross proceeds of $5,000,000. Each unit includes one common share and one common share purchase warrant.

news.headline: Solana sees a drop in memecoin activity with daily launches and revenue falling below usual levels at Pump.fun.
news.summary: Pump.fun, a prominent launchpad for memecoins on the Solana blockchain, is currently witnessing a decrease in activity. The platform, known for its daily launches, is experiencing a downturn as both the number of launches and revenue generated have dropped below their typical levels.

news.headline: European companies are employing managed network services to boost digital transformation, according to ISG.
news.summary: In London, there is a growing trend among enterprises across Europe to opt for managed network services providers to drive their digital transformation efforts, according to ISG. This shift indicates that a significant number of businesses are embracing external assistance to propel their digital agendas efficiently.

news.headline: USU named a 'Leader' by Forrester in SAM Solutions report. Report evaluates 9 providers.
news.summary: A company based in Germany and the United States, USU, has recently been acknowledged as one of the leading providers of Software Asset Management (SAM) solutions by the well-known analyst firm Forrester Research. This recognition came in Forrester's latest report titled "The Forrester Wave™: Software Asset Management Solutions, Q1 2025," where USU was specifically identified as a "Leader" among a total of nine top providers evaluated. For those interested, the complete Forrester report can be obtained from USU upon request.

news.headline: Oil traders see OPEC+ delaying April hike despite Trump’s call.
BNB Chain reveals 2025 roadmap with focus on faster transactions, AI integration, and improved security. #DeFi #Web3
news.summary: BNB Chain has revealed its ambitious technology roadmap for 2025, with a key emphasis on improving transaction speed, incorporating artificial intelligence, and heightening security measures. These advancements are aimed at propelling the evolution of decentralized finance and Web3. The roadmap outlines strategic initiatives to enhance the platform's capabilities, with a specific focus on accelerating transaction processing, integrating AI technologies, and fortifying security protocols. This forward-looking approach indicates a strong commitment to driving innovation within the realms of decentralized finance and the decentralized web.

news.headline: Astar Network initiates ACS campaign to enhance ASTR token utility within Soneium ecosystem, rewarding active users.
news.summary: A campaign known as the Astar Contribution Score (ACS) has been launched by Astar Network with the aim of enhancing the functionality of its native token, ASTR, in the Soneium ecosystem. Active participants are set to receive rewards as part of this initiative.

news.headline: NVIDIA's new In-Game Inference SDK boosts gaming realism with AI characters; uses generative AI for dynamic interactions.
news.summary: A new development from NVIDIA is the In-Game Inference SDK, designed to seamlessly incorporate AI characters into gaming environments. This innovation aims to elevate the level of realism in games by utilizing generative AI models to enable dynamic interactions. This technology is set to revolutionize the gaming experience for players, offering more engaging and immersive gameplay.

news.headline: Dow drops 450 points as Walmart stock tumbles by 6.5%, investor sentiment declines with Fear & Greed index neutral.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a drop in overall market sentiment, maintaining a "Neutral" rating on Thursday. U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones index plummeting by approximately 450 points during the trading session. Walmart Inc. (NYSE:WMT) saw a decrease of about 6.5% in its shares following the quarterly report. Walmart anticipates a sales growth of 3% – 4% in constant currency for the first quarter of FY26, with adjusted earnings per share projected to be $0.57 – $0.58 compared to an estimated $0.64. For the full FY26, Walmart expects sales to increase by 3% – 4% in constant currency, with adjusted earnings per share forecasted to be $2.50 – $2.60, falling below the anticipated $2.76. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Vipshop will release Q4 results: estimated earnings at $5.39/share, revenue at $32.07 billion, down from previous year.
news.summary: Vipshop Holdings Limited (NYSE: VIPS) is set to unveil its Q4 financial results on Friday, Feb. 21, 2025, before the market opens. Analysts forecast the Boston-based company to post earnings of $5.39 per share for the quarter, a drop from $5.79 per share in the same period last year. Vipshop anticipates quarterly revenue to reach $32.07 billion, a decrease from $34.67 billion in the previous year. In the third quarter, the company reported sales of $2.95 billion, marking a 9.2% decline compared to the prior year's period. More details can be found on Benzinga's website.

news.headline: Global turmeric oleoresin market to reach USD 192.2 Mn by 2034 from USD 75.5 Mn in 2023, with a CAGR of 8.8% driven by demand for natural ingredients.
news.summary: The global turmeric oleoresin market is growing rapidly, with a valuation of US$ 75.5 Mn in 2023 and a forecasted CAGR of 8.8% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$ 192.2 Mn by 2034. This growth is driven by increasing demand for natural and organic products in various industries like food, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, and dietary supplements. North America is experiencing rapid growth due to consumer preference for clean-label ingredients, while Asia Pacific leads in production, benefiting from well-established turmeric cultivation. Turmeric oleoresin is known for its health benefits and is used in industries like food, pharmaceuticals, and cosmetics. Leading players like Synthite Industries, Kancor Ingredients, and Akay Group are investing in research and innovation for high-purity products. Key market trends include the growing demand for functional foods and bioavailability-enhanced turmeric extracts.

ShaikhTech and Cavago team up to digitize the equine industry globally with 3D technology, marking a revolutionary milestone.
news.summary: In London on February 21, 2025, ShaikhTech, a prominent technology firm known for its expertise in developing 3D digital twins for cities and assets, and Cavago, an up-and-coming online platform reshaping the equine industry, have revealed a recent collaboration. This partnership marks an important alliance between the two companies.

news.headline: Tineco introduces FLOOR ONE S7 Stretch Ultra for effortless floor cleaning with HyperStretch technology.
news.summary: In Paris, Tineco, a prominent player in smart home appliances, is revolutionizing home cleaning by introducing the FLOOR ONE S7 Stretch Ultra. This state-of-the-art cleaning device aims to provide an exceptional cleaning experience with its advanced technology and user-friendly operation. The product offers unmatched flexibility through HyperStretch technology, ensuring effortless navigation even in difficult-to-reach spots. This innovation showcases Tineco's commitment to simplifying daily floor maintenance.

Immunovia's Q4 2024 results to be released on Feb 25, 2025, with a webcast at 15:00 CET for analysts, investors, and media.
news.summary: A company based in Lund, Sweden, known as Immunovia, is set to release its complete financial results for the year 2024 on February 25, 2025, at 8:30 am Central European Time (CET). Interested parties including analysts, investors, and media personnel can join a live webcast teleconference scheduled for 3:00 pm CET on the same day. During the teleconference, the company will provide a detailed report along with presentation slides outlining their performance for the year.
